name: @forgeax/engine-input
description: Frame-start scanned, frozen InputSnapshot Resource (keyboard.down/up + mouse.movementDelta + mouse.button(0|1|2)) + browser PointerLock backend for forgeax-engine.

bundle-size.reason: Final M1-M5 surface measurement: dist/index.mjs = 8661 B gzip (35291 B raw, 34.5 KB). Threshold 9530 B = ~10% headroom over measured gzip. Includes: action-state.ts (deriveActionStates + getAxis/getVector), gesture-recognizer.ts (5 state machines), gamepad-frame.ts (DB remap), browser-backend.ts (recognizer wiring + lazy-load), input-snapshot.ts (action/gesture readpoints + PointerType narrowing), index.ts (barrel). The SDL controller DB sub-export (dist/controller-db.mjs, ~1.5 KB gzip) and data sub-export (dist/controller-db-data.mjs, ~45 KB gzip / 545 KB raw) are opt-in lazy dynamic-imports and are NOT in the main-entry path (path=dist/index.mjs).

fps.reason: library package, no runtime canvas; fps is reported by hello-* / learn-render apps that consume engine.input.snapshot()

bench.reason: frame-start scan path is O(events-since-last-tick); not a perf-critical surface for the MVP

gate.reason: no package-level binary gate; AC-07 surface coverage runs as part of pnpm test:unit + tsc -b

spike-report.reason: not a spike package; this is a production MVP per plan-strategy D-5 (input internalisation minimal surface)
